violations.text: The Menu board and/or order station does not have an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025
Dish washer (employed by facility management) was observed drying cleaned and sanitized dishes with a cloth towel. PIC informed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025
